header_title.description: Dzina la pulogalamu likuwonetsedwa pa mutu. Pulogalamu ya kupeza mapangidwe a chakudya cha dziko lonse.

header_subtitle.text: Pezani mapangidwe a chakudya kuchokera padziko lonse
header_subtitle.description: Malemba omwe amawonetsedwa pansi pa dzina la pulogalamu pa mutu.

home_page_hero_title.description: Mutu waukulu pa gawo la tsamba loyamba.

home_page_hero_subtitle.text: Sankhani mapangidwe enieni kuchokera m'nyumba zosiyanasiyana padziko lonse
home_page_hero_subtitle.description: Malemba owerengera oonekera pansi pa mutu waukulu pa tsamba loyamba.

home_page_featured_title.description: Mutu wa gawo likuwonetsedwa pamwamba pa grid ya makadi a mapangidwe.

recipe_card_cooking_time.description: Malemba a nthawi yophikira pa kadikadi ka mapangidwe. {minutes} imasinthidwa ndi chiwerengero cha mphindi.

recipe_card_difficulty.description: Malemba omwe amawonetsedwa pamaso pa mulingo wa zovuta pa kadikadi ka mapangidwe.

recipe_card_easy.description: Mulingo wa zovuta ukuwonetsa mapangidwe osavuta.

recipe_card_medium.description: Mulingo wa zovuta ukuwonetsa mapangidwe ovuta pang'ono.

recipe_card_hard.description: Mulingo wa zovuta ukuwonetsa mapangidwe ovuta.

recipe_card_ramen_name.description: Dzina la mapangidwe a Tonkotsu Ramen.

recipe_card_ramen_description.text: Msuzi wa mkaka wa mafupa a ng'ombe wokhala ndi chashu yofewa, dzira lofewa, ndi mtedza watsopano.
recipe_card_ramen_description.description: Kufotokozera kwa mapangidwe a Tonkotsu Ramen.

recipe_card_margherita_name.description: Dzina la mapangidwe a Pizza ya Margherita.

recipe_card_margherita_description.text: Pizza ya Neapolitan yakale yokhala ndi ma tomati a San Marzano, mozzarella watsopano, ndi basil.
recipe_card_margherita_description.description: Kufotokozera kwa mapangidwe a Pizza ya Margherita.

recipe_card_tacos_name.description: Dzina la mapangidwe a Tacos al Pastor.

recipe_card_tacos_description.text: Tacos a nyama ya nkhumba yophika ndi maapulo a pineapple, cilantro, ndi anyezi pa mkate wa chimanga.
recipe_card_tacos_description.description: Kufotokozera kwa mapangidwe a Tacos al Pastor.

recipe_card_butter_chicken_name.description: Dzina la mapangidwe a Butter Chicken.

recipe_card_butter_chicken_description.text: Nkhuku yofewa mu msuzi wa tomato ndi batala wokhala ndi zonunkhira zokoma.
recipe_card_butter_chicken_description.description: Kufotokozera kwa mapangidwe a Butter Chicken.

recipe_card_pad_thai_name.description: Dzina la mapangidwe a Pad Thai.

recipe_card_pad_thai_description.text: Mtedza wa mpunga wokazinga wokhala ndi nsomba, tofu, ma peanut, ndi msuzi wa tamarind.
recipe_card_pad_thai_description.description: Kufotokozera kwa mapangidwe a Pad Thai.

recipe_card_crepes_name.description: Dzina la mapangidwe a Crepes za ku France.

recipe_card_crepes_description.text: Crepes ochepa, ofewa okhala ndi Nutella, strawberi watsopano, ndi kirimu wopukutidwa.
recipe_card_crepes_description.description: Kufotokozera kwa mapangidwe a Crepes za ku France.

locale_switcher_label.description: Dzina lopezeka kwa wosankha chilankhulo mu chikwatu cha mutu.

locale_switcher_en.description: Kusankha chilankhulo cha Chingerezi mu wosankha chilankhulo.

locale_switcher_ja.description: Kusankha chilankhulo cha Chijapani mu wosankha chilankhulo.

locale_switcher_es.description: Kusankha chilankhulo cha Chisipanishi mu wosankha chilankhulo.
